notableEvents.label: José Tena GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Tena grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Tyler Callihan. Dylan Crews out at 2nd. José Tena out at 1st.
